# Chapter title

## Purpose

State the chapter purpose.

## Central question

State the question this chapter answers.

## Argument sequence

1. Opening problem.
2. Evidence-based development.
3. Counterargument or limitation.
4. Provisional conclusion.

## Evidence notes

Use only verified source notes and citekeys from `../../bibliography/references.bib`.

## Open issues

Mark missing support before drafting final prose.
